title: How to Grow Your AI Search Visibility With LinkedIn Content
author: Margarita Loktionova
notes: Used for current LinkedIn guidance on customer questions, employee authors, clear point of view, consistent terminology, and standalone readable paragraphs.

title: LinkedIn Pages Best Practices
author: LinkedIn
notes: Used for Page completeness, weekly posting, scheduling, employee mentions, and Page-level practices. Treat performance figures as LinkedIn-stated platform observations.

title: Post analytics for your content
author: LinkedIn
notes: Used for individual post analytics: impressions, reach, profile viewers, followers gained, reactions, comments, reposts, saves, sends, link visits, viewer demographics, estimates, and availability limits.

title: Content analytics for your LinkedIn Page
author: LinkedIn
notes: Used for Page content analytics: impressions, engagement rate, engagement interactions, 30-day aggregate metrics, and individual-post metrics.

title: How I boosted LinkedIn impressions with EGC at Microsoft
author: Heike Young
notes: Used only as a public example of an employee-generated content program mentioning agency, tools, strategy, content pillars, market moments, and upcycling to brand accounts.

title: Unlock Employee-Generated Content's Hidden Potential
author: Chris Cunningham
notes: Used only as a public example of a company leader describing multiple employees creating LinkedIn content and naming role-based expertise.

title: What Is Employee-Generated Content?

title: How To Turn Employee Expertise Into Useful LinkedIn Posts
author: Jeffery Schroeder

title: Founder Content vs Employee Content
author: Jeffery Schroeder
